mapper.select: SELECT b.noticeboard_number AS boardNumber, b.board_title AS boardTitle, b.board_content AS boardContent, b.board_date AS boardDate, b.board_click AS boardReadCount, a.admin_nickname AS memberId FROM UB_NOTICEBOARD b JOIN UB_ADMIN a ON b.admin_number = a.admin_number WHERE b.noticeboard_number = #{noticeBoardNumber}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT b.noticeboard_number AS boardNumber, b.board_title AS boardTitle, b.board_content AS boardContent, b.board_date AS boardDate, b.board_click AS boardReadCount, a.admin_nickname AS memberId FROM UB_NOTICEBOARD b JOIN UB_ADMIN a ON b.admin_number = a.admin_number ORDER BY b.board_date DESC ) subquery ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
